title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 411.551 - Alteration of receipt — effect of
text:
411.551.  Alteration of receipt — effect of. — The alteration of a receipt shall not excuse the warehouseman who issued it from any liability if the alteration was:
  (1)  Immaterial;
  (2)  Authorized; or
  (3)  Made without fraudulent intent.  ­­­
(L. 1965 p. 606) 
*Word "at" appears in original rolls.
